mapper.sql: id, name, description, category, prompt_template_id, status, doc_count, chunk_count, create_by, update_by, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kb_knowledge_base (name, description, category, prompt_template_id, status, doc_count, chunk_count, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{category}, #{promptTemplateId}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'active'), COALESCE(#{docCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{chunkCount}, 0), COALESCE(#{createBy}, 'system'), COALESCE(#{updateBy}, 'system'))
mapper.delete: UPDATE kb_knowledge_base SET status = 'archived' WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE kb_knowledge_base SET doc_count = doc_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE kb_knowledge_base SET chunk_count = chunk_count + #{delta} WHERE id = #{id}
